free_text: Excitation functions of reactions induced by 1H and 2H
ions on natural Mg, Al and Si
Colorado University, Boulder, Co
52-Inch Cyclotron of Colorado Univ.
Irradiation and measurement
was done in cyclic manner using pneumatic shuttle
system for transporting the targets.
Single target irradiation was used. Beam current was
monitored by Faraday-cup.
Absolute elemental cross sections were measured.
Total error was calculated.
The main error source is the uncertainty of the
target thickness which is about 10%.
VS. SF3 corrected in subentries 009-010,
024. ERR-1 added in 001. STATUS: code added.
